reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: All gates passed. The blob_sidecars_by_range RPC handler lacks epoch-based filtering to restrict serving blobs to pre-Fulu epochs during the transition period, violating the spec requirement (SG-011 INV-002). The code is reachable via P2P (untrusted), not dead code, and in-scope for Fulu. However, the concrete security impact beyond protocol non-compliance is not fully articulated. Confirmed as potential vulnerability pending clarification of exploitability.
reviewed_items.spec_reference: SG-011 (blob_sidecars_by_range_deprecated): INV-002 - Transition period serves only pre-Fulu blobs
